$schema_note: Canonical topic list for the Fieldstone help-center corpus. Consumed by scripts/generate-corpus.ts. When you change this file, regenerate the affected articles (do not hand-edit raw/**/*.md). See docs/PATH_2_PLAN.md.

categories.title: Orders & Shipping
categories.description: How customers track, receive, and troubleshoot orders in transit.

articles.title: Tracking your order
articles.angle: Where customers find the tracking link, what each status means, and what to do when tracking stalls for more than 48 hours.

articles.title: Shipping methods and delivery timelines
articles.angle: Compares standard (3–5 business days) and expedited (1–2 business days), what cutoffs apply for same-day handoff to the carrier, and why same-day delivery is not offered.

articles.title: International shipping
articles.angle: Current countries Fieldstone ships to, who pays duties and customs, and how return shipping works from outside the US.

articles.title: When will my order ship
articles.angle: Typical handoff time from order placement to carrier pickup, how weekend/holiday ordering affects the window, and how to read the order status field.

articles.title: Shipping to PO boxes, APO, and FPO addresses
articles.angle: Which address types Fieldstone supports, which ship methods work with each, and why oversize items (rugs) are carrier-restricted.

articles.title: Delivery issues and lost packages
articles.angle: Walks the customer through the 'marked delivered but not received' flow, when to wait 48 hours, and when support escalation is warranted.

articles.title: Order confirmation emails
articles.angle: What the confirmation email contains, what to do if it never arrives, and how to retrieve a lost order number.

categories.title: Returns & Exchanges
categories.description: How the return window, fees, and final-sale rules work end-to-end.

articles.title: How to start a return
articles.angle: The step-by-step return flow from the customer's perspective — what they need (order number + email), what arrives (RMA + label), and what happens once the warehouse receives the item.

articles.title: Return eligibility and the 30-day window
articles.angle: Exactly when the 30-day window starts (delivery date, not order date), what counts as 'unopened' vs 'opened,' and the three categories that are never eligible.

articles.title: Refund timelines
articles.angle: From warehouse receipt to funds posted: why the 5–7 business day figure is a band not a promise, and why the clock starts at warehouse receipt not label creation.

articles.title: Final sale items
articles.angle: Which items are final sale (and how they're marked in the catalog), why final sale exists, and what options remain if a final-sale item arrives damaged.

articles.title: Exchanges vs. returns
articles.angle: Why Fieldstone processes exchanges as return-plus-new-order rather than an in-place swap, and how that affects refund timing.

articles.title: Damaged or defective items
articles.angle: How damage claims differ from standard returns: no restocking fee, no 30-day limit in practice, and what photos help support resolve the claim faster.

articles.title: Return shipping fees
articles.angle: The $7.95 opened-item fee, why unopened returns are free, and the rule for orders with mixed eligibility.

categories.title: Product Care
categories.description: How to maintain each product line over years, not weeks.

articles.title: Cast iron: seasoning and daily care
articles.angle: How the 10" skillet arrives pre-seasoned, the first-cook ritual, what soap is (and isn't) OK, and how to recover from surface rust.

articles.title: Cutting board maintenance
articles.angle: Daily cleaning, monthly mineral-oil treatment for the walnut board, and the two things (dishwasher, prolonged soaking) that crack hardwood.

articles.title: Washing and drying linen
articles.angle: First-wash softening, water temperature, why tumble-drying speeds up softening but shortens fiber life, and how to handle wrinkles without an iron.

articles.title: Caring for wool rugs
articles.angle: Weekly care (vacuum without beater bar), spot treatment for common spills, and when to invest in professional cleaning for the 5×7.

articles.title: Ceramic and dishwasher use
articles.angle: Which ceramic pieces are dishwasher-safe (mixing bowls yes, espresso cups yes, glazed serving pieces yes), and how to prevent thermal shock when moving from fridge to oven.

articles.title: Candle safety and burn tips
articles.angle: First-burn instructions to prevent tunneling, when to trim the wick, safe burn duration per session, and why the holiday candle is final sale.

articles.title: Long-term care for oiled wood
articles.angle: Walnut and oak patina over five years: what's normal aging vs. damage, how to spot-repair scratches, and a two-minute monthly oil routine.

categories.title: Sizing & Specifications

articles.title: Rug sizes and fit guide
articles.angle: How the 5×7 wool rug works in common room sizes (bedroom runner at the foot, small living room centered, dining under-table rules).

articles.title: Cast iron skillet capacity guide
articles.angle: What fits in the 10" skillet by number of servings, oven compatibility, and typical weight expectations for a customer used to nonstick.

articles.title: Mixing bowl set volumes
articles.angle: Approximate volumes of the three-bowl ceramic set and typical use cases (whisking two eggs → large batch of dough).

articles.title: Linen throw blanket dimensions
articles.angle: Throw-size conventions, how the linen throw works over a queen-foot vs. draped over a sofa arm, and how it softens over wash cycles.

articles.title: Espresso cup volumes and fit
articles.angle: Cup volume vs. a standard single/double espresso pull, what fits under common home machines, and why the cups are demitasse-profile rather than latte cups.

articles.title: Cutting board dimensions and workflow
articles.angle: Board footprint in a standard home kitchen, how it pairs with common knife sizes, and why it's a single slab not a glue-up.

categories.title: Account & Order Lookup

articles.angle: The FG-NNNNNN format, where to find it, and why it's the single identifier support needs.

articles.angle: Fieldstone uses email + order number instead of accounts. How to retrieve past orders via the confirmation emails, and what's coming.

articles.angle: How to recognize a duplicate charge vs. a pending authorization, and why billing questions always escalate to a human.

articles.title: Finding your order number
